---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in QuotaDrift
title: "[BUG] "
labels: [bug]
---

## Summary
Describe the issue and impact.

## Reproduction
Steps, expected behavior, actual behavior.

## Environment
OS, Python version, run mode (local/docker), relevant config.

## Logs and Trace
Include errors, request IDs, and contract trace if available.
